The recipe is easy to make and sure to be a crowd favorite! #filipinofood #tiktokgrowthchallenge #lumpiangshanghai #partyfood #springrollrecipe

🇵🇭 Arroz a la Cubana | Filipino Food Bible Episode 5 Arroz a la Cubana originated in Spain, making its way to the Philippines during the colonial period. Though it is a popular humble dish in its country of origins, there are elements that are distinctly Filipino in our version that set it apart. Namely, the use of saba, ground meat and other seasonings! 😍 INGREDIENTS: Arroz a la Cubana: - 1 whole white onion, diced - 10-15 cloves of garlic, sliced - 1 large tomato, diced - 2-3 tsp of tomato paste - 2kg of ground beef - 1/3 cup of soy sauce - 2 tbsp of Worcestershire sauce - 1 large potato, diced - 1 large carrot, diced - 1-2 bell peppers, diced - 1/2 cup of green peas - 1/2 cup of raisins - 1 tbsp of Spanish paprika - Salt and pepper to taste Others: - saba banana, sliced in half and fried - 2 eggs, sunny side up INSTRUCTIONS:  - To start sauté onions, garlic, and tomatoes until soft before adding tomato paste and mixing them together.  - Then add your ground meat, adding Worcestershire and soy sauce. Add vegetables like carrots, potatoes, bell peppers, and green peas along with raisins for added sweetness.  - Mix together, and season with paprika, salt, and pepper.  - Serve with saba, a heaping serving of your arroz a la Cubana, fried eggs and enjoy! #cookingasmr #asmr #filipinofood #pinoyfood

d: 🇵🇭 Kare Kare | Filipino Food Bible Ep. 10 Kare-kare is a rich Filipino stew made with oxtail, tripe, and vegetables, all simmered in a thick peanut sauce. It’s usually served with bagoong (fermented shrimp paste) on the side to balance the flavors and an extra level of umami and saltiness 😋 INGREDIENTS: Boiling liquid: - 1-2 red onions, chopped - 2 bulbs of garlic, chopped - 1 tbsp of salt - 1 tbsp peppercorns - 5-6 bay leaves - 1 kg of oxtail - 650g of ox tripe - Beef stock as needed Kare Kare: - 10g of annatto powder - 2 tablespoons oil - 15-20 cloves garlic, minced - 2 tbsp annatto powder - 1 white onion, diced - 1 banana heart, chopped, washed and rinsed w/ salt - Beef stock as needed - green beans, chopped - eggplants, quartered - pechay/bok choy - 1 ½ cup peanut butter - Patis to taste - ½ teaspoon salt - 1 tbsp of sugar (optional to taste) Toasted rice slurry: - 1:5 tbsp of water to toasted rice, blended Served with:  - Bagoong  - Crushed peanuts INSTRUCTIONS:  - Start by seasoning your meat with salt and pepper and sear. Add all ingredients under “boiling liquid” and fill the pot as needed with beef stock. Simmer until tender, remove meat and set aside the broth for later.  - Saute onions, garlic, and banana hearts in oil mixed with annatto powder. Add your meat back and cover with the broth from the boiling liquid and simmer for 15-20 minutes. - To thicken the mixture, add toasted rice to a food processor or blender. Take some of the rice and mix with water to form our slurry.  - Add both rice slurry and peanut butter stir and reduce to thicken. Season with patis/salt/pepper and add your vegetables.  - Serve alongside bagoong top and enjoy!  #CookingASMR #ASMR #FilipinoFood #PinoyFood
zh: 菲律宾卡雷卡雷｜菲律宾美食圣经第10集。卡雷卡雷是一道浓郁的菲律宾炖菜，以牛尾、牛肚和蔬菜为食材，在浓厚的花生酱汁中慢炖而成。通常搭配虾酱（发酵虾酱）一起食用，以平衡风味并增加鲜味与咸味。（附详细食材及做法）

d: Filipino Style Grilled Pork Belly  Ingredients: 2 lbs pork belly preferably with skin on Marinade: 1/4 Cup Banana Ketchup 1/2 Cup Soy Sauce 1/8 Cup Calamansi Juice or lemon/lime juice 6 minced cloves garlic  1 tsp black pepper 1 tsp kosher salt Toyomansi sauce: 1/3 cup soy sauce Calamnsi juice to taste 1-2 thai chili peppers Instructions: 1. Cut the pork belly lengthwise and score them. 2. Make the marinade by mixing the ingredients listed above. 3. Marinade the pork belly for at least 3 hours or overnight. 4. In a medium heat grill, grill the pork belly for 5 minutes per side. 5. Then cook indirectly and close the grill and grill for 10 more minutes. 6. Enjoy with toyomansi, white rice and some fresh vegetables. #liempo #food #recipe #bbq #filipino

d: Want Pinoy food that lasts in your fridge that's NOT adobo? Try this recipe. 🔥  This version of estofado traces back to a 1935 cookbook, and the cooking process tells a story. In a time before refrigeration, it was made to last, feeding families for days. Every bite offers a glimpse into how people once cooked with care, preserving both flavor and longevity through thoughtful techniques and ingredients. 👩🏻‍🍳  ESTOFADONG FILIPINO From the book: 1935 Libro nin Pagluto asin Pagconserva Ingredients: 1 kilo of meat (usually beef or pork) 1 cup vinegar 2 onions 5 saba bananas (ripe plantains) 2 glasses of water 1 cup sugar 1 head of garlic 1 small glass (copita) of gin (Ginebra) Procedure: 1. Fry the meat until browned. Set aside the fried meat, this will be used for the stew. 2. In a separate pot or pan, caramelize the sugar by heating it with a bit of vinegar. 3. Once the sugar has melted and slightly caramelized, add the remaining vinegar and water. Stir and cook until the mixture resembles a broth. 4. While it's simmering, prepare a pot (koron) by lining the bottom with banana leaves or any barrier to prevent the meat from sticking or burning. 5. Place the fried meat into the pot, along with all the ingredients: chopped onions, garlic, sliced saba bananas, and the prepared broth. Also, add the gin at this stage. 6. Cover the meat with banana leaves to seal in moisture and flavor. 7. Cook over low heat, and once it starts boiling, reduce the fire further and let it slowly cook until the meat is tender. 8. Once done, this dish can be preserved for up to a month, and reheated only when ready to serve. #fyp #featrmedia #filipinofood #estofado
zh: 想在冰箱里备一道耐放的菲律宾菜，不想只吃Adobo？试试这个食谱。这版Estofado源自1935年的一本菜谱，烹饪过程本身就是一段历史。在没有冰箱的年代，它被设计成可以保存数日、供全家食用的菜肴。食材：肉类1公斤（通常为牛肉或猪肉）、醋1杯、洋葱2个、熟Saba香蕉5根、水2杯、糖1杯、大蒜1头、金酒（Ginebra）少许。做法：1.将肉煎至上色备用。2.用少量醋将糖焦糖化。3.加入剩余醋和水，搅拌煮成汤底。4.锅底铺蕉叶防粘。5.放入煎肉及所有食材：洋葱、大蒜、香蕉片、汤底和金酒。6.用蕉叶盖住肉封住水分。7.小火慢煮至肉质软烂。8.完成后可保存长达一个月，食用时再加热。

🥩🍲 BEEF NILAGA 🇵🇭 | FILIPINO COMFORT FOOD AT ITS BEST Nothing beats a steaming bowl of Beef Nilaga! 🇵🇭❤️ Tender beef chuck and meaty beef knuckles simmered low and slow until melt-in-your-mouth tender, then cooked with sweet corn, potatoes, cabbage, and bok choy in a rich, flavorful broth. Simple ingredients, incredible flavor, and the perfect meal with a bowl of steamed rice. 🍚✨ Ingredients: • 2–3 lbs beef chuck, cut into large chunks • 2–3 lbs beef knuckles/beef bones with meat • 1 onion, quartered • 2 scallions, cut into 2-inch pieces • 1 tbsp whole black peppercorns • 2 beef bouillon cubes or 2 tbsp beef powder • 2 tbsp fish sauce (or to taste) • Salt, to taste • 2 ears corn on the cob, cut into pieces • 2 medium potatoes, peeled and quartered • 2 carrots, sliced (optional) • ½ head cabbage, cut into wedges • 2 bunches bok choy • Water Directions: 1. Cover beef chuck and beef knuckles with water and bring to a boil. Parboil for 5–10 minutes. 2. Drain and rinse the beef and pot. 3. Return beef to the pot and cover with fresh water. Add onion, peppercorns, beef bouillon (or beef powder), fish sauce, and salt. 4. Simmer for 2–3 hours, or until the beef is tender. 5. Add corn, potatoes, and carrots. Cook for 15–20 minutes. 6. Add cabbage and bok choy. Cook for 3–5 minutes more. 7. Stir in scallions and adjust seasoning to taste. 8. Serve hot with steamed rice and enjoy! What’s your favorite Nilaga pairing—extra patis, calamansi, or chili peppers? Let me know in the comments! 👇 #BeefNilaga #FilipinoFood #PinoyFood #FilipinoRecipe #ComfortFood

🇵🇭 Filipino Pancit Canton! 🇵🇭 Try making this for your family this week! I’m definitely not a chef or even a food content creator, but I love making Filipino food for my family. I want to show you that making yummy Filipino food is just a few ingredients away. If I can do it, you definitely can too! 🇵🇭 Pancit Canton Ingredients: 🔵 1.5 cups chopped cabbage 🔵 1 cup sliced carrots 🔵 1 cup snap peas  🔵 4 Chinese sausage links 🔵 1 bag fish balls  🔵 Pancit canton noodles *Altered sauce recipe since mine in the video was too salty* 🔵 1 cup water  🔵 1/2 chicken bouillon cube 🔵 1 tbsp soy sauce  🔵 1 tbsp oyster sauce  *add more water if too salty or add salt if too bland Steps: 1. Chop / slice veggies and protein  2. Boil veggies for 1 min then set aside  3. Sauté fish balls and sausage for 3 mins then set aside  4. Bring to boil: water, chicken bouillon, soy sauce, and oyster sauce 5. Add noodles, let simmer then mix with sauce  6. Add veggies and meats  7. Enjoy! 🇵🇭 *Serve best with a squeeze of Calamansi or lime  #filipinofood #filipinorecipes #filipinobbq #filipinoparty #pancit

d: Grabe ang Sarap ng Balbacua! 🐮 Lutong Bahay na Comfort Food sa Pata ng Baka! #Balbacua #PinoyRecipe  Balbacua Recipe — rich, flavorful, and comforting Pinoy beef stew! 😋 Malambot na beef pata na niluto sa tausi at tomato sauce — perfect sa kanin 🍛 🧂 Ingredients: • 1 kg Beef Pata (Trotters)  Pakuluan sa tubig na may sibuyas, luya, at asin, pressure cook 45 mins. • 1 tbsp cooking oil • 1 thumb-size ginger (sliced) • 1 large onion (chopped) • 5 cloves garlic (minced) • 1 tbsp annatto (anato) powder • 1 small red bell pepper (sliced) • ½ cup tomato sauce • 2 tbsp tausi • 1 tsp black pepper powder • 2 pcs spicy green chili • 2 pcs siling pansigang • 1 pc broth cube • 1L water • Spring onions & toasted garlic (pang garnish) 🔥 Procedure: 1️⃣ Painitin ang mantika, igisa ang luya, bawang, at sibuyas. 2️⃣ Idagdag ang annatto powder at red bell pepper. 3️⃣ Ilagay ang pinakuluang beef pata at haluin. 4️⃣ Isama ang tomato sauce, tausi, black pepper, sili, broth cube at tubig. 5️⃣ Pakuluin hanggang lumapot at malasa. 6️⃣ Timplahan ayon sa panlasa, lagyan ng spring onions at toasted garlic. 🍛 Best served with: steamed or fried rice! #Balbacua #PinoyRecipe #FilipinoFood #LutongBahay #ComfortFood #BeefPata #Cookingtripco #Foodtok #SarapNgPinoy #HomeCooking #FoodVlog #RecipeVideo #foryou
h: balbacua, pinoyrecipe, filipinofood, lutongbahay, comfortfood, beefpata, cookingtripco, FoodTok, sarapngpinoy, homecooking, foodvlog, recipevideo, foryou
zh: 巴尔巴库阿真的太香了！用牛蹄做的家常慰藉美食——浓郁、鲜美、暖心的菲式炖牛蹄，加豆豉和番茄酱慢煮至软烂，最配白饭。食材：牛蹄1公斤（加洋葱、姜、盐焯水后压力锅煮45分钟）、食用油、姜、洋葱、蒜、胭脂树粉、红椒、番茄酱、豆豉、黑胡椒粉、辣椒、高汤块、水、葱花及蒜酥装饰。做法：爆香姜蒜洋葱，加胭脂树粉和红椒，放入牛蹄翻炒，加番茄酱、豆豉、黑胡椒、辣椒、高汤块和水，煮至汤汁浓稠入味，按口味调味，撒上葱花和蒜酥。最佳搭配：蒸饭或炒饭。

d: Espasol is one of those snacks that always reminds you of your childhood. ❤️  Soft, chewy, and coated in toasted rice flour, it has that lightly nutty flavor that keeps you reaching for another piece. It's the kind of kakanin that feels comforting the moment you take a bite. Catch more food stories from our Laguna series on YouTube. 🔥  ESPASOL Ingredients: 16 oz glutinous rice flour 2 cans coconut milk 1 can evaporated milk 1 can condensed milk pinch salt macapuno Procedure: 1. Toast the glutinous rice flour in a large pan or wok on medium-high heat and stir frequently so it doesn’t burn. Once it turns a light shade of brown and becomes aromatic, remove from heat. Set aside about ½ cup toasted flour to coat the bottom of your pan. 2. In a large bowl, add all ingredients, including the rest of the toasted flour and stir until incorporated. Transfer back to the pan and bring to a boil.  3. Lower heat to medium-low and stir until the mixture forms into a ball.  4. Once the mixture is smooth and shiny, remove from heat and transfer to the prepared pan. Spread evenly. 5. Sprinkle the rest of the toasted flour and make sure to coat the full surface. Slice and serve! #fyp #featrmedia #filipinofood #laguna #espasol

Kakanin/ rice cake season
 
 If you’re Filipino, you know what I’m talking about. The festive season kicks off in September. Here is an easy recipe to save for the upcoming holidays. I made this for my daughter’s first birthday and it was a hit! It was all gone, I didn’t get to try it😅
 
 4 cups glutinous rice
 2 cans and a half cans of coconut milk, I used 2 of the 400ml can and 1 smaller can 250ml.
 2.5- 3 cup dark brown sugar (adjust the sweetness to your likings).
 1 tsp salt
 
 Wash and rinse the glutinous rice 3 -4 times. Cook the rice using the white rice setting. While rice is being cooked, prepare the sauce. Pour coconut milk, sugar and salt in a saucepan. Let it boil and keep stirring to prevent from burning. Continue stirring for about 30 minutes until sauce becomes thick. I kept stirring until the rice was cooked. I poured half of the sauce to the hot rice and mixed everything until incorporated. Place in a baking dish. Preheat oven to 350’F. Placed the remaining sauce on top of the rice cake and bake it for 30-35 minutes until bubbles starts to appear and sauce becomes thicker. Enjoy with your unsweetened hot tea or during family gatherings during holiday season. #biko #ricecake #filipino #filipinofood

Biko sa gata with homemade latik. Simple lang, pero panalo sa lasa. Ingredients: For the biko 2 cups glutinous rice 2 cups water 1 cup sugar 1 3/4 cups coconut milk Pinch of salt For the latik 4 cups coconut cream 1 cup brown sugar Pinch of salt #biko #kakanin #latik #filipinofood #lutongbahay

Sapin-Sapin literally means “layers” in Filipino, referring to its distinct bands of purple, yellow, and white. It’s a steamed glutinous rice 🍚 cake (kakanin), soft and chewy, often topped with latik (toasted coconut 🥥 curds) or grated coconut. Its vibrant appearance makes it a centerpiece dessert at fiestas, birthdays, and holidays. Sapin-Sapin is believed to have originated in Abra, a province in Northern Luzon, though it has spread widely across the Philippines 🇵🇭 Traditionally, it was reserved for special occasions because of the labor-intensive process of steaming and layering each section. Each layer usually carries a different flavor and color: Purple (ube) – earthy, sweet, and iconic in Filipino desserts. Yellow (jackfruit or langka) – fruity and fragrant. White (coconut milk) – rich and creamy base. Sometimes condensed milk or sugar is added for sweetness, and latik provides a nutty contrast. For Filipino Americans, sapin-sapin often carries nostalgia for family gatherings, fiestas, and balikbayan boxes, reminding them of the communal spirit of Filipino culture. #kakanin #merienda #riceislife #filipinofood

d: Kata apa yang bikin kamu paling kaget?😳🇪🇸🇮🇩 Ternyata ada banyak kosakata indo yang sama dengan bahasa spanyol tapi artinya bedaaaa🤣🙅🏻‍♀️ 1. 🇮🇩BESAR: grande (🇬🇧big)  🇪🇸BESAR: cium💋 (🇬🇧kiss) 2.🇮🇩KAKAK: señorita (🇬🇧miss)  🇪🇸CACA: tai💩 (🇬🇧poop) 3.🇮🇩CINTA: amor (🇬🇧love)  🇪🇸CINTA: tape 4. 🇮🇩PAGAR: valla(🇬🇧fence)  🇪🇸PAGAR: bayar (🇬🇧pay) 5.🇮🇩CARA: manera (🇬🇧way)  🇪🇸CARA: muka atau mahal (🇬🇧face or expensive) 6.🇮🇩MAS: Señorito/ chico joven (🇬🇧mister)  🇪🇸MÁS: lebih (🇬🇧more) #fyp #bahasaindonesia #belajarbahasa #learnspanish
zh: 哪个词最让你震惊？印尼语和西班牙语中有很多词拼写相同但意思完全不同：1. 印尼语BESAR=大；西班牙语BESAR=亲吻 2. 印尼语KAKAK=姐/哥；西班牙语CACA=大便 3. 印尼语CINTA=爱；西班牙语CINTA=胶带 4. 印尼语PAGAR=篱笆；西班牙语PAGAR=付钱 5. 印尼语CARA=方式；西班牙语CARA=脸/昂贵 6. 印尼语MAS=先生；西班牙语MÁS=更多

d: Honey Garlic Chicken!  #easyrecipe #cooking #easydinner #asianfood #ricebowl  For the meat 🍗: 1lb chicken thighs 2 tsp canola oil Salt, Pepper to taste 2 tbsp cornstarch (enough to coat) For the sauce: 1.5 tbsp low sodium soy sauce 3 tbsp honey 2 tbsp water 1/2 tbsp sugar 1/2 tsp red pepper flakes 1/2 tsp paprika 3 garlic cloves (minced) 2 tbsp green onion whites

Creamy Tuscan Chicken Pasta 🍝 Ingredients 1 chicken breast (cut in half) ½ tbsp paprika ½ tbsp garlic powder ½ tbsp onion powder 1 tsp salt 1 tsp black pepper Dash of olive oil 3 cups cooked pasta 2 tbsp olive oil 2 tbsp butter 1 small onion, diced 3 garlic cloves, minced 1½ cups cherry tomatoes, halved 1 tbsp tomato paste ⅓ cup sun-dried tomatoes 1 tbsp Italian seasoning 1 tbsp paprika Salt and pepper to taste ¾ cup heavy cream ½ cup pasta water 2 cups spinach (or less if preferred) 1 cup grated Parmesan cheese Instructions: - Season chicken with paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper. - Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the chicken and cook on both sides until golden brown and the internal temperature reaches 165°F. Remove from the pan and set aside. - In the same pan, add butter and diced onion. Cook until onions are translucent, then add minced garlic and cook for about 1 minute. - Stir in cherry tomatoes and cook for 2–3 minutes until softened. Add tomato paste and sun-dried tomatoes, stirring for another minute. - Add Italian seasoning, paprika, salt, and pepper. Cook for 1 minute, then pour in the heavy cream and pasta water. Stir well and let it simmer for 2 minutes. - Add spinach and Parmesan cheese. Stir until the cheese is melted and the sauce is creamy. - Slice the cooked chicken and return it to the pan. Let it simmer briefly to absorb the flavors, then add the cooked pasta. Toss until everything is evenly coated. - Garnish with extra Parmesan and serve warm and enjoy! #pasta #chicken  #ho#homemadefoodunch #dinner

d: #recipes #easyrecipe #cooking #dinnerideas

Sheet Pan Garlic Parmesan Chicken and Potatoes 🧄🧈 For ALL of you asking about the app, search “Osta” on the app or Google play store 🫶 Minimal effort, maximum flavor… juicy chicken, crispy potatoes covered in garlicky parmesan butter perfection 🔥 For the potatoes: - 1.5 lbs (680 g) baby potatoes - 1/3 cup butter, melted - 1 cup parmesan cheese - 8 garlic cloves, minced - Seasonings: 2 tsp each of paprika, oregano, garlic powder, salt, black pepper - 3 tbsp olive oil For the chicken: - 6 to 8 chicken thighs, boneless & skinless - Seasonings: 1 tbsp seasoning salt, 1 tbsp paprika, 2 tsp garlic powder, 2 tsp onion powder, 2 tsp italian seasoning, 1 tsp cumin - 1 lemon, juiced - 2 tbsp mayonnaise For the garlic & onion: - 2 garlic heads + 2 tbsp olive oil + 2 tsp salt - 1 red onion, cut into chunks + olive oil, drizzled For the Aioli:  - 1/3 cup greek yogurt + 1/3 cup mayonnaise - 2 roasted garlic heads - 1/4 lemon, juiced - 2 tsp black pepper + 1 tsp salt - 3 tbsp chives, chopped For the Baste (optional ): - 1/4 cup mayonnaise  - 1/4 cup parmesan  - 2 tsp paprika Instructions: 1. In a bowl, combine the chicken, seasonings, lemon juice, garlic, and mayonnaise. Mix well and marinate for as long as you wish (up to overnight). 2. Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C). Add the potatoes to a large casserole dish. Toss with the melted butter, parmesan, olive oil, garlic, and seasonings. Spread evenly. 3. Top with the chicken thighs. Add the red onion chunks around the dish & drizzle them with olive oil.  4. Slice the tops off the garlic heads, drizzle with olive oil and salt, wrap in foil, & place in dish. 5. Bake for 40 mins. Broil for the last 2–3 mins if desired.  6. Optional but recommended: Mix together mayo, parmesan, and paprika. At the 20-min mark, baste the chicken & return to the oven. 7. In a bowl, combine the yogurt, mayo, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and chives. Squeeze in as much of the roasted garlic as you wish OR chop them up first. Mix. 8. Finish with fresh parm, chives, & lemon slices. Enjoy! #recipe #cookingathometiktoktv #dinner #recipesoftiktok #dinnerideas

d: Home Cooking Sessions: Hachis Parmentier. The French Shepherds Pie. Full recipe and long-form video now up on Substack, link in bio 🇫🇷🥩 - Today’s recipe is a real crowd pleaser. At its core, it’s a simple combination of slow-cooked beef and mashed potato, but like many French classics, the magic comes from the attention paid to each individual component. In this version I make a few tweaks to the traditional recipe whilst staying true to the components that make it so special. The result sits somewhere between a great cottage pie and a luxurious beef bourguignon. Deeply savoury, rich without feeling heavy and exactly the sort of dish that rewards a slow Sunday afternoon in the kitchen. For the full recipe, head over to Substack and hit subscribe - link in bio. NF x

d: Crispy bacon, eggs cooked in bacon fat, and a sweet soy sauce glaze over rice. Simple, dangerous, and way too good. If you’re interested in Japanese home cooking, check out the link in my profile. Bacon and Egg Rice Bowl Ingredients — 1 serving ・Bacon: 120g ・Eggs: 2 ・Cooked rice: 1 serving (Sauce) ・Soy sauce: 2 tsp ・Mirin: 2 tsp ・Sugar: 1/2 tsp ・Grated garlic: 1/2 tsp (Toppings) ・Chopped green onion: as needed ・Black pepper: as needed Instructions ① Cut the bacon to your preferred thickness. ② Cook the bacon in a pan without oil until nicely browned. ③ Fry the eggs in the bacon fat. ④ Add the sauce ingredients and simmer for about 1 minute. ⑤ Serve over rice and finish with green onion and black pepper. Save this recipe for your next easy dinner. #baconandeggs #ricebowl #japanesefood #donburi #easyrecipe #japaneserecipe #homecooking

d: S’mores Cookies 🍪🍫🤎 Soft, gooey cookies stuffed with chocolate, marshmallows, and crackers! Makes: 8 cookies Ingredients • 85 g butter, softened • 75 g granulated sugar • 75 g brown sugar • 1 egg • ½ tsp vanilla extract • 180 g all-purpose flour • ½ tsp baking powder • ½ tsp salt • 100 g dark chocolate, chopped • Chocolate pieces, marshmallows & crackers for filling Method 1. Preheat oven to 180°C (160°C fan). 2. Cream butter and sugars until fluffy. Mix in egg and vanilla. 3. Stir together flour, baking powder, and salt, then mix into the wet ingredients. 4. Fold in the chopped chocolate. 5. Place a cracker, chocolate piece, and marshmallow together, then wrap completely with cookie dough. 6. Bake for 8–12 minutes until lightly golden. 7. Cool slightly and enjoy! 💌 #baking #bakingrecipe #smores #cookies #recipes

Making @Andy Cooks dinner in 20 minutes!  Ingredients:  * 500 g mince * 1 tbsp oil * Salt * 1 red onion, diced * 3 small tomatoes, diced * 1 garlic clove, crushed * Spices: smoked paprika, ground coriander, garlic powder, cumin, garam masala, chilli * 1 cup frozen peas * ½ cup water * Cooked rice, to serve Method: Heat oil in a pan. Add mince, season with salt, and leave to brown before breaking it up. Add onion and cook briefly, then stir in tomatoes, garlic, and spices. Cover and simmer for 4–5 minutes. Add peas and water, then simmer for another 2–4 minutes until cooked and slightly saucy. Serve over rice. #cooking #food #blockblast #recipe

d: Dinner #1 from my $50 grocery haul 🍴 Tonight we're making a One Pan Smoked Sausage Broccoli & Cheddar Pasta. This recipe is a great example of how I approach budget cooking. Instead of buying butter, flour, milk, and several seasonings to make a cheese sauce from scratch, we're using a jar of alfredo sauce as a creamy, pre-seasoned base and transforming it into a broccoli cheddar sauce with a little cheese and some smoked sausage. The goal isn't to make the fanciest dinner possible. The goal is to make a dinner that's affordable, easy to follow, family-friendly, and made with ingredients that can be used throughout the week. And honestly? This one tastes way more expensive than it is. #budgetmeals #cheapmeals #familydinner #mealplanning #dinnerideas
zh: 用50美元的食材采购做一顿晚餐——烟熏香肠西兰花芝士意面（一锅搞定）

d: GOCHUJANG LIME CRISPY CHICKEN BITES 🌶️ INGREDIENTS Chicken: • 2 lbs boneless skinless chicken thighs, cut into small nugget-sized pieces • 1 cup buttermilk • 1 tablespoon gochujang • 1 tsp kosher salt • 1 tsp garlic powder • ½ tsp black pepper Coating: • 1 cup cornstarch • ½ cup flour • 1 tsp baking powder Sauce: • 3 tbsp gochujang • 2 tbsp honey • 2 tbsp brown sugar • 2 tbsp soy sauce • 1 tbsp rice vinegar • 1 tbsp sesame oil • Zest of 1 lime • Juice of 1 lime • 2 cloves garlic, minced • 1 tsp grated ginger Kewpie Drizzle: • ½ cup Kewpie mayo • 1 tbsp lime juice • 1 tsp honey • Splash of water to thin Quick Cucumber Salad: • 2 cucumbers, sliced • 2 tbsp rice vinegar • 1 tsp sesame oil • Pinch of salt • Sesame seeds METHOD 1. Marinate chicken with buttermilk, gochujang, salt, garlic powder, and pepper for at least an hour. Less time is probably fine, doesn’t matter that much I guess.  2. Toss the chicken in cornstarch, flour, and baking powder until fully coated. I had some panko laying around so I mixed that in too.  3. Airfry at 400°F for 10-12 minutes or normal fry at 350°F for 4-5 minutes until lightly golden. Remove and rest 5 minutes. Fry it twice for extra crisp.  4. While the chicken cooks, combine all sauce ingredients in a skillet and simmer for 2-3 minutes until glossy. 5. Toss hot chicken in the sauce. 6. Mix together the cucumber salad ingredients. 7. Whisk together the Kewpie drizzle ingredients. Serve over rice with the cucumber salad, drizzle generously, and finish with green onions, sesame seeds, and an extra squeeze of lime. #dinnerideas #humor #korean #cooking

d: crispy chicken caesar salad croissants 🥗🥐 these over the wraps anyday omg 😣     recipe:   ingredients- 4 thin sliced chicken breasts 1 cup all-purpose flour (120g) seasonings (to taste)- salt, black pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, smoked paprika, italian seasoning, chili powder, kinder bold chicken seasoning blend for the wet mixture- 2 eggs 2–3 tbsp heavy cream (30–45g) 1–2 tbsp pickle juice for the coating- 1½ cups panko breadcrumbs (90g) 2–3 tbsp grated parmesan for the caesar salad- romaine lettuce, chopped croutons extra parmesan other ingredients- 4 large croissants oil for frying garlic butter- 2 tbsp melted butter (28g) 1 clove garlic, minced parsley extra parmesan caesar dressing- 1 cup mayo (240g) ½ cup finely grated parmesan (50g) 2–3 cloves garlic, minced 2 tbsp lemon juice (30g) 1 tbsp dijon mustard (15g) 1 tsp worcestershire sauce ½ tsp salt ½ tsp black pepper ¼ cup olive oil (60g) 2–4 tbsp water (to thin if needed) instructions: season the chicken generously with your spices. in one bowl, mix the flour with any remaining seasoning. in another bowl, whisk together the eggs, heavy cream, and pickle juice. in a third bowl, combine the panko and parmesan. coat each piece of chicken in the flour, then the egg mixture, then the panko mixture. let the breaded chicken rest for 5–10 minutes. fry in oil over medium heat until golden brown and cooked through, about 4–5 minutes per side. transfer to a wire rack. for the dressing, whisk together the mayo, parmesan, garlic, lemon juice, dijon, worcestershire, salt, and pepper. slowly whisk in the olive oil, then add water until smooth and pourable. toss the chopped romaine with some of the caesar dressing. add croutons and extra parmesan. slice the croissants in half and spread a little caesar dressing on both sides. add the crispy chicken, top with the caesar salad mixture, and sprinkle with more parmesan. mix together the melted butter, garlic, and parsley. brush the tops of the croissants with the garlic butter and finish with extra parmesan. serve immediately and enjoyyyy    #caesarsalad #crispychicken #croissant #Recipe #EasyRecipe

d: HOMEMADE NUTTER BUTTERS 🥜 for our series Better Than Store-Bought! We’re somewhere around 50 episodes into this series and this is one of my favorites so far (right up there with our homemade Oreos, cheez its and pop tarts!)  Search ‘crowded kitchen nutter butters’ online for the full recipe or head to our website (linked in profile)  Makes 40 sandwich cookies  For the cookies:  1 cup unsalted butter, melted 1 cup granulated sugar 1 cup natural creamy peanut butter* (no sugar added, just peanuts and salt) 2 large eggs 2 teaspoons vanilla extract 2 cups all-purpose flour 2 tablespoons cornstarch 1 teaspoon baking soda 1 teaspoon baking powder For the filling:  ½ cup natural creamy peanut butter (no sugar added, just peanuts and salt) 1 cup powdered sugar 4 - 5 tablespoons milk of choice 1 teaspoon vanilla extract In a large mixing bowl, mix together the melted butter, sugar and peanut butter using an electric mixer until smooth and completely incorporated. Add in the eggs and vanilla extract one at a time, mixing well between each addition. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, baking soda and baking powder. Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix just until there are no dry streaks remaining. The dough should be thick.   Cover and refrigerate the dough for at least one hour.  Preheat the oven to 325˚F and line two baking sheets with parchment paper. Scoop the dough out in one teaspoon-sized portions. Roll each portion into a ball, then place two balls next to each other (touching) on the baking sheet, spacing them about 1 ½ inches apart. (It's quickest to scoop all of the dough first, then roll into balls after.) Using the tines of a fork, press down widthwise and then lengthwise to create a criss cross pattern and to flatten out the dough.  Bake for 13-15 minutes, until the bottoms are deep golden brown. Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes, then transfer the cookies to a cooling rack to cool completely before filling.  Add the peanut butter, powdered sugar, 4 tablespoons of milk and vanilla to a mixing bowl and mix until smooth and completely incorporated. If it's too thick to pipe, add an additional 1 tablespoon of milk.  Transfer the mixture to a piping bag (or just any regular plastic bag and cut off the corner to pipe). Flip over a cookie so the flat bottom is facing up. Pipe a ~½ teaspoon dollop on each side of the cookie. Place another cookie on top to create a sandwich. Repeat and enjoy!
zh: 自制 Nutter Butters 花生酱夹心饼干——"比超市买的更好"系列

d: If your skillet nachos don’t make somebody say “that’s too much,” add more cheese. I don’t know who created this first so tag ‘em 🔥🔥🔥They were 💯 Skillet Nachos Ingredients: 2 lbs ground beef 1/2 white onion, diced 16 oz shredded cheese 8 oz chunky salsa 2 to 3 tablespoons taco seasoning Tortilla chips Toppings of choice Directions: Cook the ground beef and onion in a skillet over medium heat until browned. Drain if needed. Stir in taco seasoning and salsa, then simmer on low for 2 to 3 minutes. Cover the meat with shredded cheese, place a lid on top, and heat on low until melted. Spoon over tortilla chips and finish with your favorite toppings. Homemade Taco Seasoning Ingredients: 1/4 cup chili powder 1 teaspoon garlic powder 1 teaspoon onion powder 1/2 teaspoon cayenne pepper 1 teaspoon dried oregano 2 teaspoons paprika 3 tablespoons ground cumin 1 tablespoon kosher salt 2 teaspoons coarse ground black pepper Directions: Add all of the seasonings to a small coffee grinder or food processor. Pulse a few times until everything is evenly mixed and the oregano breaks down into the spice blend. Transfer the seasoning to a small airtight jar and store it in a cool, dry place. Use 3 tablespoons of this mix as a substitute for one 1.25 ounce packet of taco seasoning. For tacos, add it to your cooked meat with a small splash of water and let it simmer until the seasoning coats everything nicely. #nachos #mexicanfood #cheese #food #foodtiktok

d: LEMON BRÛLÉE 🍋 RECIPE ⬇️ This is a very simple but incredibly effective dessert. I saw a bunch of these recipes going around last summer, and thought I’d give it a go - well worth it. - Using 4 lemons (get ones without wax on the shell, as will use the zest), split 3 of them in half lengthways and remove the flesh  - Pass the flesh through a sieve measure out around 110ml, and reserve it in a bowl - In a saucepan add 500ml whipping cream, 120g white sugar, and the zest from the 4th lemon. Bring to a simmer and reduce slightly until it coats the back of a spoon - Pour the mixture back into the lemon shells and chill in the fridge for 6 hours or overnight - Top with brown sugar and use a torch to melt / brown it - Serve once the sugar has set hard #lemon #dessert #brulee #posset #cooking
zh: 焦糖柠檬食谱 这是一道做法简单但效果极佳的甜点。取4个柠檬（选无蜡外皮的，因为要用皮屑），将其中3个纵向对半切开并挖出果肉。将果肉过筛，量取约110ml备用。在锅中加入500ml淡奶油、120g白糖和第4个柠檬的皮屑，加热至微沸并稍微收汁至能挂勺。将混合液倒回柠檬壳中，冷藏6小时或过夜。表面撒上红糖，用喷枪烤至焦糖化。待糖硬化后即可上桌。

d: Most tourists miss this street in Tokyo. Sunamachi Ginza is about a 15–20 min walk from Nishi-Ojima. It’s known for cheap, local street food and a famous oden spot locals line up for daily. d: Tales of Tuscany's Demo is out now, you can try it for free on Steam 👊 This is my RPG Tales of Tuscany - an RPG with combat like Undertale mixed with WarioWare, team building like Pokemon, and the vibes of Earthbound. It’s a choose your own adventure where you can build your own story and get collectibles to trade with friends online after every playthrough. I’ve also added a rogue battling mode, challenge modifiers like a nuzlocke mode or one-hit challenge, plus lots and lots of ingame content. You should wishlist it, it helps me a lot and you’ll know when it comes out this year!!! #indiegame #gamedev #nintendo #rpg
zh: Tales of Tuscany试玩Demo现已上线，可在Steam免费体验。这是我的RPG游戏《托斯卡纳传说》——战斗系统融合了Undertale与WarioWare，组队玩法借鉴Pokemon，整体氛围致敬Earthbound。游戏采用自由选择叙事，每次通关后可获得收藏品并与好友在线交换，还加入了肉鸽对战模式、Nuzlocke等挑战修改器及大量游戏内容。欢迎加入愿望单，这对我帮助很大，届时你也会第一时间得知发售消息！

d: Making an indie game takes longer than you might expect. On average it takes indie devs and studios 3 years of game development to release the initial version of a game. 🎮  For instance, the original Stardew Valley took 4.5 years to develop. Depending on the quality of the game, it could reach upward of 8 years such as Factorio and Cup Head. 🫖  When developing your video game, make sure to define your scope and limit expectations for your initial launch. Otherwise you’ll be trapped in development hell! 🔥  How long have you been working on your indie game? Let me know in the comments below 👇  #indiedev #gamedesign #gametok #gamedev #
zh: 制作一款独立游戏所需的时间可能超出你的想象。独立开发者或团队平均需要3年才能发布游戏初始版本。例如，原版《星露谷物语》历时4.5年开发；而《异星工厂》和《茶杯头》等高品质游戏甚至耗时长达8年。在开发游戏时，务必明确项目范围、合理控制预期，否则很容易陷入开发地狱！你的独立游戏已经开发多久了？欢迎在评论区告诉我。

d: REST STOP might be our first independent game, but it definitely won't be our last. We don't want to be limited by one genre, we just want to tell stories worth experiencing. We're just getting started, so we hope you stick around!  Our game is now available to wishlist on Steam! And follow our studio page @Ant Parade Interactive to follow us along on this journey 🖤 #indiedevs #gaming #indiegames #horrorgame #gamestudio

Not all bad takes are wrong but this one is. If you haven’t checked out this indie game, it’s worth checking out!  Parkour through the ruins of a megastructure, climb massive bosses, and hunt down every construction equipment in this slice of life action-adventure with immaculate vibes. #indiegames #parkourgame #whattoplay #steamgames #motorslice

Steam page coming soon. #gaming #videogame #whattoplay #indigames #gamingontiktok
zh: 这位独立开发者正在制作一款只能看到角色脚印的平台游戏，太有创意了！——通过脚印探索关卡——利用声音、水坑和地面材质追踪自己的移动——考验你的感知力、反应力和直觉。游戏名为《我在这里吗？》，Steam页面即将上线。

d: Imagine hand-drawing every single frame of an entire open-world game by yourself for 6.5 years. That's what this indie dev did - Over 10,000 unique artworks - A simple journey to your grandmother's turns into something else entirely - Fully open sandbox with no loading screens It's called Sketchy Fables. You can wishlist it on Steam now. #gamingontiktok #whattoplay #indigames #videogame #gaming
zh: 想象一下，一个人用6年半的时间为整个开放世界游戏手绘每一帧画面。这正是这位独立开发者所做的——超过10000幅独特画作——一段去外婆家的简单旅程，最终演变成了别的东西——完全开放的沙盒，没有加载界面。游戏名为《Sketchy Fables》，现已在Steam上开放加入愿望单。

d: READ BEFORE COMMENTING ‼️Here’s some context, the videos shown in the video are how the circus shows up on the monitor. But the animation that we see in the show is how the characters see it, due to them being in the game they can see it in high quality. But since the circus was created in 1999? The characters show up as low poly. #theamazingdigitalcircus #glitchproduction #tadc #scary #analoghorror
zh: 评论前请先阅读！视频中展示的画面是马戏团出现在监控器上的样子。而我们在节目中看到的动画，是角色们自己看到的效果——因为他们身处游戏之中，所以能看到高清画面。但由于马戏团创建于1999年，角色们呈现为低多边形模型。

d: New York Times Top 50 Recipes of 2025 | Hoisin Garlic Noodles by @nytcooking @hettymckinnon Ingredients • 14 oz dried wheat or egg noodles • ¼ cup Hoisin • 2 tbsp Soy sauce  • 1 tbsp Sesame oil • 2 tsp Maple syrup or honey  • Vegetable oil • 6 garlic cloves, finely chopped • 6 scallions, white & green parts sliced • 4 tbsp toasted sesame seeds • Salt & pepper Cook the noodles in salted boiling water until al dente, then drain and rinse to cool. Mix hoisin, soy sauce, sesame oil, and maple syrup in a small bowl. Heat oil in a large skillet, add the garlic and white scallion parts, and cook until fragrant, then quickly pour in the sauce and add the noodles, tossing to coat. Let the noodles cook undisturbed until the bottom turns crispy, 2 to 3 minutes, then season to taste. Serve topped with sesame seeds and the green scallion parts. #nytcooking #recipe #noodles #cooking #foodtok
zh: 2025年《纽约时报》年度50大食谱——海鲜酱蒜香面条（@nytcooking @hettymckinnon）：干燥小麦面或蛋面约400克、海鲜酱¼杯、生抽2汤匙、芝麻油1汤匙、枫糖浆或蜂蜜2茶匙、食用油、蒜末6瓣、葱白葱绿各切片6根、烤芝麻4汤匙、盐和胡椒。将面条在盐水中煮至有嚼劲后捞出冲凉。将海鲜酱、生抽、芝麻油和枫糖浆混合备用。热油后下蒜末和葱白炒香，倒入酱汁，加入面条翻拌，静置2至3分钟至底部焦脆，调味后撒上芝麻和葱绿即可。

d: Sheet Pan Crunchwraps These sheet pan crunchwraps are loaded with seasoned beef, melty cheese, crunchy tostadas, and fresh toppings. All baked together for the easiest way to a quick weeknight dinner.  Ingredients 7–8 burrito-size tortillas 1 lb ground beef 1 packet taco seasoning ¼ cup water 1 cup shredded Colby Jack cheese 6 tostada shells 1 jar cheese sauce 1 cup shredded lettuce 1 tomato, diced 1 cup sour cream 2 tbsp butter, melted Creamy Taco Dip ⅓ cup mayo ⅓ cup sour cream 1 tsp taco seasoning (can add more)  2 tbsp mild taco sauce (I used Taco Bell-style) Instructions 1. Cook the beef In a skillet over medium heat, brown the ground beef until fully cooked. Drain excess grease, then add taco seasoning and ¼ cup water. Stir and simmer until thickened. 2. Prep the pan Preheat oven to 400°F and grease a 9x13 sheet pan. 3. Layer the base Arrange 6 burrito tortillas around the pan, overlapping and hanging slightly over the edges to fully cover the bottom. 4. Build the crunchwrap     * Add taco meat in an even layer     * Drizzle cheese sauce over the top     * Place tostada shells evenly across     * Spread sour cream     * Sprinkle lettuce, tomato, and shredded cheese 5. Seal it up Place 1–2 tortillas in the center, then fold the overhanging tortillas inward to fully enclose everything. 6. Bake Brush the top with melted butter. Place another sheet pan on top to press it down.     * Bake for 15 minutes     * Remove the top sheet pan and bake another 10–15 minutes, until golden and crispy 7. Serve Let cool slightly, then cut into 6 crunchwraps. Make the Dip In a small bowl, mix mayo, sour cream, taco seasoning, and mild sauce until smooth. Serve alongside for dipping! ✨ Tip: Add jalapeños, avocado, or swap in shredded chicken to switch it up! #easyrecipe #tacotuesday #dinnerideas #mexicanfood #easydinner
zh: 烤盘版脆皮墨西哥卷——材料：大号玉米饼7至8张、碎牛肉450克、塔可调料1包、水¼杯、科尔比杰克奶酪碎1杯、托斯塔达脆饼6片、奶酪酱1罐、生菜丝1杯、番茄1个切丁、酸奶油1杯、黄油2汤匙（融化）；蘸酱：蛋黄酱⅓杯、酸奶油⅓杯、塔可调料1茶匙、淡味塔可酱2汤匙。做法：1.炒熟牛肉，加调料和水收汁；2.烤盘预热至200°C并涂油；3.用6张饼铺满烤盘底部并留边；4.依次铺上肉、奶酪酱、脆饼、酸奶油、生菜、番茄和奶酪；5.用剩余饼盖顶，将四周饼边折叠封口；6.刷黄油，压上另一个烤盘，先烤15分钟，取下上层烤盘再烤10至15分钟至金黄酥脆；7.稍凉后切成6份，配蘸酱享用。

d: My formal apology + a new comfort food recipe 🥹

Lao food is not talked about enough so I’m starting this new series talking about Lao Foodways, exploring the intersection of culture and history through Lao cuisine.  To celebrate this series, I created an in depth Lao Sticky Rice Guide with 5 different methods to cook sticky rice and it’s for all that want to perfect their sticky rice cooking skills. WELCOME TO MEDITERRANEAN MADNESS 🍋☀️  my brand new summer series where I’ll be showing you how to make some of the best dishes the Mediterranean has to offer this is part 3 and today were taking a trip to Palestine , to make some Arayes 🇵🇸 this is a wonderful quick, easy and tasty dish to make. You can feel free to use store bought pitas if you want to make this even quicker. I recommend a 20% beef fat mix as this has a lot more flavour, lamb is also super good to replace the beef if you wish! enjoy :) (6) Filling: 500g beef/lamb mince 3 garlic cloves minced 100g finely chopped parsley  1 small brown onion grated/finely diced 1 jalapeno diced 1 tsp ground ginger 1 tsp ground green cardamon 1 tbsp black pepper 1/2 tbsp salt 1 tsp garlic power 1 tsp onion powder 1/2 tsp nutmeg 2 tsp allepo chili pepper 1 tsp smoked paprika 2 tsp extra virgin olive oil Sauce: 200g greek yoghurt 50g chopped parsley 1/2 tsp salt 1 tsp black pepper 1 tbsp extra virgin olive oil 1 garlic clove minced Pita breads (1) Make your filling by combining all the ingredients in a large bowl. Mix well and let rest in the fridge for at least 30 minutes but even better overnight. (2)  Make your dipping sauce by combining all the ingredients in another bowl, mix well and let rest in the fridge for a minimum 30 minutes to allow the flavours to fuse together. (3) Now slice your pita bread in half and gently open them up, fill them up with the mixture then set aside. You will be able to make 6 Arrays with this recipe! Now heat up a grill pan and oil it well, then once very hot, add the arayes one by one and cook for roughly 30 seconds on each side, ensuring you get those grill marks all over. Once seared nicely, remove and place in a preheated oven at 180C and bake for 10 minutes until the meat is fully cooked and the bread is crispy. Serve with the dipping sauce and enjoy ! #arayes #middleeasternfood #mediterraneanfood #fyp

Crispy Chicken Shawarma Wraps 🔥 For all of you asking about my recipe organizing app, search “Osta” on the app or google play store 🫶 Juicy chicken shawarma, creamy garlic sauce and crispy fries wrapped into one perfect bite 🌯 For the Chicken: -1.5 lbs (680g) skinless chicken thighs, sliced into strips -Seasoning: 1 tbsp paprika, 1 tbsp cumin, 1 tbsp onion powder, 2 tsp coriander, 1 tsp allspice, 2 tsp turmeric, 2 tsp black pepper, 1 tsp salt -3 tbsp olive oil -8 garlic cloves, minced -2 tbsp tomato paste -1/3 cup Greek yogurt -½ lemon, juiced For the Onions: -1 red onion, thinly sliced -2 tbsp olive oil -½ lemon, juiced -1/4 cup fresh parsley, finely chopped -1 tsp salt, 1 tsp black pepper, 2 tsp sumac For the Garlic Sauce: -1/2 cup Greek yogurt -1/2 cup mayonnaise -3 garlic cloves, minced -1/4 lemon, juiced For the Red Sauce Glaze: -1/4 cup olive oil + 2 tbsp tomato paste -1 tbsp pomegranate molasses (optional) -1 tsp paprika For Assembly: -3 Roma tomatoes, diced -Pitas -Frozen french fries Instructions: 1. In a bowl, combine the sliced chicken, spices, olive oil, garlic, tomato paste, yogurt, and lemon juice. Mix well & marinate for as long as your patience can handle, up to overnight. 2. In a large pan over medium-high heat, add a layer of olive oil. Once hot, add the chicken. Cook undisturbed for 3 mins, then cook for 6–7 more mins, stirring often, until golden & cooked through. 3. In a bowl, combine the sliced red onion, olive oil, lemon juice, parsley, salt, pepper, and sumac. Toss well, set aside. 4. In a bowl, mix the Greek yogurt, mayo, garlic, and lemon juice. Set aside in fridge. 5. In a bowl, whisk olive oil, tomato paste, pomegranate molasses (if using), & paprika. 6. Prepare your French fries however you like. Assemble the wraps: spread a generous layer of garlic sauce onto each pita. Top with  chicken, French fries, diced tomatoes & the onions. Wrap tightly. 7. Melt butter in a pan over low heat. Place the wraps seam-side down & brush the tops with the red sauce. Cook until crispy golden, flip, brush the other side, & repeat. Top with more garlic sauce. Enjoy!! #recipesoftiktok #dinnerideas #shawarma #viral #chicken
